Let $\ph,\psi$, and $\chi$ be distinct sentences. Add truth values to the
following table:

![](/content/static/images/two-truth-valuations.svg){width=150
fig-align="center" fig-alt="Truth Valuations"}

to specify a two-member set of truth-valuations $V=\{v_1,v_2\}$ with respect to
which the following three claims are all true:

1. $\ph,\psi\models_V\chi$
2. $\ph\not\models_V\chi$
3. $\psi\not\models_V\chi$
